name: Old South Benne Seed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line cookie sheets with foil.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, brown sugar, egg, flour, and vanilla. Beat until well mixed.
4. Stir in toasted sesame seeds.
5. Drop dough onto the foil-lined baking sheets using about half a teaspoon for each cookie. Space cookies 2 inches apart.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until cookies are lightly browned.
7. Remove from sheets immediately and cool on racks.
